identity.title: Driver identity verification
identity.subtitle: synthetic gallery · embed → match (C2)
identity.dpdpNote: DPDP posture — synthetic, consented faces only. No real driver biometrics are processed.

assumptions.title: Assumptions & Methodology
assumptions.subtitle: D.2 sub-criterion 1 — solution approach, synthetic data & simulators
assumptions.intro: Production APIs are JNPA-facilitated, post-award. In this PoC each is replaced by a public-schema simulator matching the real wire contract, so swapping mock → live is a configuration change, not a rewrite.

sources.title: Production APIs → PoC simulators
sources.body: Vahan (RC), Sarathi (DL) and FASTag are served by a 25k-plate regex-valid simulator; ICEGATE/TOS by schema-faithful gate & container events; ULIP relay and camera/ANPR streams by clip-replay and mock relays. Live keys drop into .env.

synthetic.title: Synthetic data
synthetic.body: All demand/supply books, gate-data, parking occupancy and telemetry are deterministic synthetic datasets — no Math.random — so every figure is byte-stable across reloads. The 20k-device trucking simulator is hot-scalable to 30k+.

dpdp.title: DPDP — synthetic faces only
dpdp.body: PoC biometrics use synthetic, consented faces only. No real driver biometrics are processed. Real PDP enrolment is a post-award, consent-gated workflow; the PoC proves the verification pipeline (embed → match → PROVISIONAL on miss) on a synthetic gallery.

kpi.title: KPI baselines
kpi.body: KPI targets/baselines are PoC demonstration defaults (KPI_TARGETS). Production baselines will be set from the JNPA baseline study; % deltas are computed against those baselines.

real.title: Real in the PoC (not assumed)
real.body: The fallback orchestration, the reactive what-if engine (TFC-1/2/3), the cross-twin UC2→UC3 DPD-release event, the KPI arithmetic, geofence violation detection and the police PDF export are all real code, exercised by tests.
